title: Reduction primitives
items: stratify(source, rules) → Graph — route input to different reduction branches
funnel(sources[], stages[]) → Graph — multi-source merge with sequential reduction stages
feedback(graph, condition, reentry) → Graph — introduce bounded cycles; GraphSpec serialization
budgetGate(source, constraints) → Node — pass-through with reactive constraint nodes
scorer(sources[], weights) → Node — reactive multi-signal scoring

title: LLM graph composition
items: GraphSpec schema — JSON schema for declarative graph topology (nodes, templates, feedback)
compileSpec(spec) → Graph — instantiate Graph from GraphSpec
decompileGraph(graph) → GraphSpec — extract spec from running graph
llmCompose(problem, adapter, opts?) → GraphSpec — LLM generates GraphSpec from NL
llmRefine(graph, feedback, adapter) → GraphSpec — LLM modifies existing graph topology
specDiff(specA, specB) — structural diff between two GraphSpecs

title: Backpressure protocol (partial)
items: Backpressure protocol — formalize PAUSE/RESUME for throughput control across graph boundaries. GraphObserveOne/GraphObserveAll expose up(). WatermarkController. Gateway helpers accept highWaterMark/lowWaterMark.
